actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been attacked at a railway station in Manchester.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man was found stabbed in the throat on Sunday and later died from his injuries.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The council has voted to stop giving out black bags to each household free of charge each year.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Two men with their faces covered knocked on a victim's door and forced their way into the home.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Seven people were arrested and charged after a pitch invasion following the game between West Bromwich Albion and Chelsea.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Anthony John McDonnell was arrested and charged with the murder of Andrew Batten from 1995.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: US Justice Department has decided to pursue life imprisonment for Ahmed Abu Khattala, the man accused of being the ringleader of the attacks on the US consulate in Benghazi.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woman has died after a two-car crash on Saturday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Executive Office has announced that a new grade A office development will be built in Ebrington, which will be able to cater to up to 500 people.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The fixtures for the upcoming rugby season were released on Wednesday, which sees Connacht take on Glasgow, Leinster hosting Treviso, and Ulster playing in the semi-finals.
